content: Are you another Norton antivirus user? There have been a recent rash of Norton users with email issues reporting almost exactly the same symptom. Simple solution is disable mail scanning and see if that fixes the issue.

content: I don't know, have you considered asking your VPN provider? You might also want to share whatever error messages appear when you have the VPN turned on. That almost certainly would assist anyone trying to guess your issue. But as VPN products routinely shield you from tracking and mask you origin using masked ip addresses it is quite possible the links you are clicking are to websites blocking those using a VPN. When you click the links in the email you receive with this reply do they work with the n[n turned on? or not what error do you get?
